title: Add ChatRateLimiter.TryAcquire unit tests
description:
## Problem
`ChatRateLimiter.TryAcquire` has zero dedicated tests. The file `ChatRateLimiter.cs` appears nowhere in the test project except as a constructor dependency of `LlmChatInterpreterTests`. Critical paths untested:
1. Per-player cooldown enforcement
2. Global per-minute max (fill sliding window → blocked)
3. Concurrent access thread-safety (`lock(_lock)` block)
4. `Prune()` method (evicts stale entries)
5. `waitTime` calculation accuracy
6. Player name case-insensitivity

## Desired Outcome
Dedicated `ChatRateLimiterTests.cs` with full coverage.

## Scope
- Create `MemorySmith.Agent.Tests/ChatRateLimiterTests.cs`
- Test: first-acquire succeeds, same-player-within-cooldown blocked, different-players independent, global-window full blocked, window slides after expiry, prune removes old entries, case-insensitive names

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Minimum 6 test methods covering boundary conditions
- [ ] Concurrent access test (multiple threads calling TryAcquire)
- [ ] All tests pass
- [ ] No new build warnings
